title: the price of Adding 1 User more

posts.author: awan (Awan Gunawan)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello,
i f i already have 3 seats, then is it possible to upgrade to 4? or it must jump to 10?

same, how about if we already have 10, must i pay 15 when i want to add 1 user only? please give me clear answer, it is really confusing for small business like mine when i check pricing page. thx
